chapter_title.en: Chapter 51 – The truthfulness and the repayment of the entrustments

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/184)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/184)
text: إِنَّمَا سُمِّيَ إِسْمَاعِيلُ صَادِقَ الْوَعْدِ لِأَنَّهُ وَعَدَ رَجُلًا فِي مَكَانٍ فَانْتَظَرَهُ فِي ذَلِكَ الْمَكَانِ سَنَةً فَسَمَّاهُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ صَادِقَ الْوَعْدِ ثُمَّ قَالَ إِنَّ الرَّجُلَ أَتَاهُ بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ فَقَالَ لَهُ إِسْمَاعِيلُ مَا زِلْتُ مُنْتَظِراً لَكَ .

en.hubeali: Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Mansour Bin Hazim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘But rather Ismail<sup>as</sup> was named as ‘truthful of the promise’ because he<sup>as</sup> promised a man (to be) in a particular place, so he<sup>asws</sup> waited for him in that place for a year. Therefore Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Named him<sup>as</sup> as ‘The truthful of the promise’’. Then he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The man did come to him<sup>as</sup> after that, so Ismail<sup>as</sup> said to him: ‘I<sup>as</sup> did not cease waiting for you’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ibn abu ‘Umayr has narrated from Mansur ibn Hazim from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Isma’il is called the truthful in his promises; he promised a man to meet him at a certain place and Isma’il waited for him at that place for one year. Thus, Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, named him the truthful in his promise. The Imam then said, ‘The man then came at that place and Isma’il said to him, “I am still waiting for you.’””
